---
title: "Souvik Das"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="35%"}
::: {.headshot-frame}
![](images/headshot.jpg){.headshot-img}
:::
:::

::: {.column width="65%"}
### About

I’m a PhD student at **Texas A&M University** working on the intersection of **Security and High-Performance Computing**.

**Interests:** High-Performance Computing, Privacy & Security, Artificial Intelligence  
**Advisors:** Dr. Nitesh Saxena & Dr. Ariful Azad  
**Email:** [souvik.das@tamu.edu](mailto:souvik.das@tamu.edu)  
**Office:** PETR 230 | PETR 246  

[Download CV](cv.qmd) · [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=7MV40LIAAAAJ&hl=en) · [GitHub](https://github.com/piy41)
:::

:::

### News
- **Dec 2025:** Started working on ___.
- **Nov 2025:** Paper accepted at ___.
